title: hieracium oletatum
intro: Hieracium oletatum, also known as Hawkweed, is a flowering plant in the dandelion-like Hawkweed genus Hieracium. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Hawkweed is often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential skin irritation and toxicity at high doses.
